known_issues: Milestone points not all visible in version 36
Vision board changed from version 28 and needs to be reverted

existing_features.title: In VisionBoard.tsx, ensure all milestone points for each goal are fully visible — no milestones should be hidden, collapsed, or truncated. All milestone items must be rendered in the list regardless of count.

Revert the VisionBoard.tsx page to the layout, interaction patterns, and visual design it had in version 28. This means undoing the milestone plus-button interaction pattern (introduced in version 36) and restoring the original milestone input fields and overall vision board UI as it appeared in version 28.

projectName: Show all milestone points and revert vision board to version 28 layout
